componentDescription: A component for users to upload files via drag-and-drop or selection from their local system.

children.description: Represents the content to be rendered inside the `DropZone`.

containerProps.description: Defines styling and layout properties for the main container of the `DropZone` component.

text.description: Specifies the main text to be displayed within the `DropZone`.
text.defaultValue: Drop files here or click to upload

textProps.description: Defines styling and layout properties for the text displayed within the `DropZone`.

className.description: Allows passing a CSS class name to style the `DropZone` component.

disabled.description: Indicates whether the `DropZone` component is in a disabled state, preventing user interaction.

imageProps.description: Defines properties for any image displayed within the `DropZone`, such as a preview image.

previewUrl.description: The URL of an image to be displayed as a preview in the `DropZone`.

selectedFiles.description: An array of `File` objects representing the files currently selected or uploaded in the `DropZone`.

onRemove.description: Callback function invoked when a file needs to be removed from the `DropZone`.
